original_abstract: This report provides background on defense-related acquisitions, recent efforts to improve acquisition processes, and related issues for Congress regarding improvements to the workforce and specific reform efforts.
humanized_abstract: This report presents background on defense-related acquisitions, reviews efforts to improve acquisition activities, and identifies and previews acquisition-related issues of potential interest to Congress, such as personnel matters and specific acquisition reform initiatives.

document.output: This report presents background on defense-related acquisitions, reviews efforts to improve acquisition activities, and identifies and previews acquisition-related issues of potential interest to Congress, such as personnel matters and specific acquisition reform initiatives.
document.input: This report provides background on defense-related acquisitions, recent efforts to improve acquisition processes, and related issues for Congress regarding improvements to the workforce and specific reform efforts.
